踏む.meaning: to step on, to tread on

折る.meaning: to snap, to break; to bend

聞こえる.meaning: to be heard, to be audible

きこえる.meaning: to be heard, to be audible

僕.meaning: I (used by men towards those of equal or lower status)

怒る.meaning: to get angry; to scold angrily

おこる.meaning: to get angry; to scold angrily

お宅.meaning: (someone else's) house; home -- polite word for 家 (いえ) --

おたく.meaning: (someone else's) house; home -- polite word for 家 (いえ) --

一生懸命.meaning: very hard (as in "to work hard"), with utmost effort

いっしょうけんめい.meaning: very hard (as in "to work hard"), with utmost effort

今度.meaning: now, this time, near future, one of these days, next time

こんど.meaning: now, this time, near future, one of these days, next time

いらっしゃる.meaning: -- honorific expression for いく, くる, and いる --

できるだけ.meaning: if at all possible, as much as possible

パート.meaning: part time (esp. female part time employees)

パートタイム.meaning: part time (esp. female part time employees)

迎える.meaning: to welcome; to meet; to greet

むかえる.meaning: to welcome; to meet; to greet

なるべく.meaning: if possible, as much as possible

用事.meaning: business to take care of; tasks; errands

ようじ.meaning: business to take care of; tasks; errands

頑張る.meaning: to try one's best, to try hard, to persist

がんばる.meaning: to try one's best, to try hard, to persist

受ける.meaning: to take (an examination, interview, etc.); to receive

うける.meaning: to take (an examination, interview, etc.); to receive

そんな.meaning: such, like that, that sort of

足りる.meaning: to be sufficient; to be enough

たりる.meaning: to be sufficient; to be enough

行う.meaning: to carry out; to conduct (typically used in written language)

おこなう.meaning: to carry out; to conduct (typically used in written language)

調べる.meaning: to check; to look up; to inquire; to search

しらべる.meaning: to check; to look up; to inquire; to search

どんどん.meaning: quickly and steadily; at a rapid pace

お礼.meaning: expression of gratitude; thanking; gift of appreciation; bow

おれい.meaning: expression of gratitude; thanking; gift of appreciation; bow

治る.meaning: to get better; to recover from illness (v.i.)

なおる.meaning: to get better; to recover from illness (v.i.)

驚く.meaning: to be surprised, to be astonished

おどろく.meaning: to be surprised, to be astonished

いただく.meaning: -- extra-modest expression for たべる and のむ; humble expression for もらう --

漬ける.meaning: to soak, to moisten, to pickle

つける.meaning: to soak, to moisten, to pickle

確か.meaning: if I remember correctly; certain, definite

たしか.meaning: if I remember correctly; certain, definite

用.meaning: errand, task, business (to take care of)

探す.meaning: to search, to seek, to look for

さがす.meaning: to search, to seek, to look for

通う.meaning: to go back and forth; to commute

かよう.meaning: to go back and forth; to commute

申す.meaning: -- extra-modest (humble) expression for 言う (いう) --

もうす.meaning: -- extra-modest (humble) expression for 言う (いう) --

おつり.meaning: change; balance of money returned to the purchaser

喜ぶ.meaning: to rejoice, to be delighted, to be glad

よろこぶ.meaning: to rejoice, to be delighted, to be glad

引っ越す.meaning: to move to a new place of residence

ひっこす.meaning: to move to a new place of residence

片付ける.meaning: to (clean) tidy up (v.t.), to put away

かたづける.meaning: to (clean) tidy up (v.t.), to put away

暮れる.meaning: to get dark, to come to an end

伺う.meaning: humble form of 行く (いく), 聞く (きく) and 来る (くる)

最近.meaning: recently, nowadays, in recent years, most recent, latest

さいきん.meaning: recently, nowadays, in recent years, most recent, latest

変える.meaning: to change, to alter, to vary

かえる.meaning: to change, to alter, to vary

是非.meaning: certainly, by all means; without fail

ぜひ.meaning: certainly, by all means; without fail

変わる.meaning: to change (v.i.), to be transformed, to vary

かわる.meaning: to change (v.i.), to be transformed, to vary

以外.meaning: other than, with the exception of, excepting

いがい.meaning: other than, with the exception of, excepting

見える.meaning: to be visible; -- polite verb meaning 来る (くる) --

みえる.meaning: to be visible; -- polite verb meaning 来る (くる) --

大体.meaning: approximately; in most cases; in general; to begin with (same as もともと)

だいたい.meaning: approximately; in most cases; in general; to begin with (same as もともと)

折れる.meaning: to break, to be folded, to give in; to turn (a corner)

おれる.meaning: to break, to be folded, to give in; to turn (a corner)

伝える.meaning: to convey (a message); to tell, to report

つたえる.meaning: to convey (a message); to tell, to report

とっきゅう.meaning: limited express (train faster than an express)

たずねる.meaning: to inquire (same as 質問する)

負ける.meaning: to lose (a game) (v.i.), to be defeated

おみまい.meaning: calling on someone who is ill, visit

さがる.meaning: to descend, to drop, to fall

褒める.meaning: to praise; to say nice things

久しぶり.meaning: it has been a long time; for the first time in a long time

ひさしぶり.meaning: it has been a long time; for the first time in a long time

見つかる.meaning: to be found (v.i.), to be discovered

みつかる.meaning: to be found (v.i.), to be discovered

召し上がる.meaning: -- honorific form of 食べる (たべる) and 飲む (のむ) --

めしあがる.meaning: -- honorific form of 食べる (たべる) and 飲む (のむ) --

集める.meaning: to collect, to gather (v.t.), to assemble

あつめる.meaning: to collect, to gather (v.t.), to assemble

冷える.meaning: to grow cold, to cool down

ひえる.meaning: to grow cold, to cool down

点く.meaning: to be started, to be switched on

うつる.meaning: to move (from a house); to transfer (from a department); to shift

いそぐ.meaning: to hurry, to be in a hurry, to rush

参る.meaning: humble expression for 行く and 来る

まいる.meaning: humble expression for 行く and 来る

役に立つ.meaning: to be helpful, to be useful

やくにたつ.meaning: to be helpful, to be useful

もうすぐ.meaning: very soon; in a few moments; days

のりかえる.meaning: to transfer (trains), to change (bus, train, etc.)

大分.meaning: fairly well, to a large extent, considerably, pretty much

だいぶ.meaning: fairly well, to a large extent, considerably, pretty much
